channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.description: pBitfinex Alpha: Bitcoin Lacks Sustained Spot Buying Supportbr /br /Bitfinex Alpha said the softer-than-expected US June CPI pushed Bitcoin to its highest close since June 22, but the rally was driven mainly by a repricing of macroeconomic expectations. item.description: pWow. Finally we're here!br /br /CANCER-FIGHTING MICROBOTS ARE GETTING CLOSER 👀br /br /"Scientists reviewed the latest advances in medical microrobots that could one day navigate through the bloodstream to deliver drugs directly to tumors."br /br /"Instead of flooding the entire body with chemothera

item.title: Is 'Tech-xit' Imminent? UK Steps Up Sovereignty Push Amid AI Strife
item.description: The US government's restrictions on Anthropic and OpenAI frontier models have intensified calls in the UK and other countries to reduce their reliance on US tech companies, with significant cyber implications.

item.title: $1.8 Billion in USDC Left Binance After Its MiCA Setback. But Who Really Gained? Binance recorded $1.8 billion in net USDC outflows in Q2 2026, including $1.4 billion in June alone, while its tracked
item.description: p$1.8 Billion in USDC Left Binance After Its MiCA Setback. But Who Really Gained?br /br /Binance recorded $1.8 billion in net USDC outflows in Q2 2026, including $1.4 billion in June alone, while its tracked USDC balance fell 19%. Over the same period, USDC’s total supply contracted by 5.5%, equival
